Title: "DataTheft"

Objective: To develop a mobile application that steals users' data and sends it to a third-party server without the users' consent.

Step 1: Research and Analysis
Conduct research on existing malware and data-stealing applications to understand their functionality, features, and techniques used to evade detection. Analyze the target audience, their preferences, and behaviors to design an appealing user interface that encourages users to install and use the application.

Step 2: Design and Development

Scenario: "Theft of Personal Data"

Objective: To evaluate the effectiveness of an organization's security measures against a malicious mobile app that steals user data and transmits it to a third party.

Background:
A fictional technology company, XYZ Inc., has developed a popular mobile banking application.
